basic_details.job_title: WCL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 444 Mining Sirdar, Assistant Foreman/ Electrical Supervisor Posts
basic_details.selection_process_brief: CBT Exam → Medical Test → Document Verification
basic_details.short_information: Western Coalfields Limited (WCL), a Miniratna PSU under the Ministry of Coal, Government of India, has released a new recruitment notification for Mining Sirdar and Assistant Foreman (Electrical) posts. This recruitment offers a great opportunity for candidates with technical qualifications to secure a permanent job in the coal mining sector. The selection will be done through a Computer Based Test (CBT) followed by medical and document verification.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: within 21 days from the opening date of online application
important_dates.raw: Short Notification Release Date: 04-07-2026 Application Start Date: To be announced Last Date: within 21 days from the opening date of online application CBT Exam Date: To be notified

vacancy_details.details: Western Coalfields Limited has released vacancies under Technical & Supervisory Grade-C posts: Mining Sirdar – 220 Posts Assistant Foreman (Electrical) / Electrical Supervisor – 224 Posts Both posts are permanent technical roles under Coal India subsidiaries with attractive salary and allowances.

how_to_apply: Click on WCL Mining Sirdar & Assistant Foreman Recruitment
Register with valid email ID and mobile number
Upload required documents and submit form

rows.western_coalfields_limited_wcl: within 21 days from the opening date of online application
CBT Exam → Medical Test → Document Verification

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Short Notification Release Date: 04-07-2026 Application Start Date: To be announced Last Date: within 21 days from the opening date of online application CBT Exam Date: To be notified

content_sections.heading: WCL Vacancy 2026 - Post Details
content_sections.text: Western Coalfields Limited has released vacancies under Technical & Supervisory Grade-C posts: Mining Sirdar – 220 Posts Assistant Foreman (Electrical) / Electrical Supervisor – 224 Posts Both posts are permanent technical roles under Coal India subsidiaries with attractive salary and allowances.

content_sections.heading: Who Can Apply for WCL Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Mining Sirdar: Diploma / Mining-related qualification with DGMS certification Assistant Foreman: Diploma in Electrical Engineering Minimum age: 18 years Maximum age: 30 years (approx.) Must meet medical fitness and eligibility norms as per WCL rules

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for WCL Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit official website westerncoal.in Go to Careers / Recruitment section Click on WCL Mining Sirdar & Assistant Foreman Recruitment Register with valid email ID and mobile number Fill the application form carefully Upload required documents and submit form Take printout for future reference

faq.question: Q1. What is WCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: WCL Recruitment 2026 is a recruitment drive by Western Coalfields Limited for Mining Sirdar and Assistant Foreman posts.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available under WCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The available posts are Mining Sirdar and Assistant Foreman (Electrical).

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are released in WCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 444 vacancies have been announced for different posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for WCL Mining Sirdar posts?
faq.answer: The salary is approximately Rs. 47,330 per month plus allowances.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for WCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Computer Based Test (CBT), medical examination, and document verification.
